about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am passionate about technology, cybersecurity, and computer engineering, with a special interest in ethical hacking and pentesting. I am currently pursuing a Master's degree in Cybersecurity, where I am deepening my knowledge of vulnerability analysis, system exploitation, service scanning, and forensic analysis.
about.p2: I consider myself an analytical, proactive person with a strong ability for self-directed learning. I enjoy developing offensive skills such as vulnerability identification and exploitation and penetration testing.
about.p3: I am constantly learning, exploring new tools and intrusion techniques with the goal of becoming a highly skilled offensive security professional.

master.title: Master's in Cybersecurity and Privacy
master.description: Student of Cybersecurity and Privacy, with knowledge in system protection, forensic analysis, and ethical hacking. I work with tools like NMap, Burp Suite, Metasploit, and Wireshark. My main goal is to achieve OSCP and CEH certifications.

degree.title: Bachelor's in Computer Engineering
degree.description: Graduated in Computer Engineering with a strong background in programming (Java, C, C++, Python, SQL, PHP), data analysis (Pentaho, Apache Superset), and web development (Angular, HTML, CSS, JavaScript). Experience in system administration (Linux, Bash scripting) and network configuration.

home.subtitle: Computer Engineer & Master's in Cybersecurity Student
home.description: Welcome to my personal portfolio. Here you'll find information about my education, experience, skills, and projects.

card.title: Web Development Internship
card.description: Design and implementation of custom web solutions, including requirements analysis, MySQL database architecture, and frontend development with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

skills.title: Skills
skills.introText: These are some of the technologies I master and use in my projects.
